title: redline.md output schema (legal-contract-review)
description: Redline suggestions: for each problematic clause, the proposed substitute text. May be paste-ready (from playbook body 替代條款文字) or LLM-generated when no playbook text exists.

proposed_text.description: substitute clause text — preferred from playbook body, else LLM-generated

rationale_zh_tw.description: why the change — short business-translation form

external_share_stripped.description: true when --external-share was passed; affects citing of playbook IDs
